narrative_beat: Close-up pagina de livro grego antigo com a palavra PHARMAKEIA em dourado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an extreme close-up of an ancient Greek manuscript page in aged parchment, with the Greek word in golden calligraphy at center, illuminated by a single candle from the left side
subject.focal_point: the golden Greek word at center of the page
subject.secondary: Other faded Greek text surrounding the highlighted word. Candle wax drip on page edge.

environment.atmosphere: etymological revelation, the original word revealed

composition.foreground: golden Greek text on warm parchment tones

lighting.key_light: single candle from left illuminating the page
lighting.fill_light: golden glow from the highlighted text itself

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: revelation, the original word that explains everything

symbolism.primary: PHARMAKEIA — the Greek word John used means pharmacy/sorcery

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.content_secondary: pela tua feiticaria foram enganadas todas as nacoes — Apocalipse 18:23
in_scene_text.font_style: ancient Greek uncial calligraphy in gold leaf
in_scene_text.medium: handwritten on aged Greek manuscript page
in_scene_text.placement: center of frame on the manuscript

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: The text in quotes MUST be rendered exactly as written, letter by letter, in the specified font style. This is a Bible verse and accuracy is sacred.
